title: Jupunba turbinata
taxonomy: Jupunba turbinata is classified as a type of flowering plant, specifically belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. This family is commonly known as the spurge family, which consists of a diverse range of plants. Within the Euphorbiaceae family, Jupunba turbinata is further classified under the genus Jupunba. The classification of Jupunba turbinata is still a subject of ongoing research and may be subject to revision. Further studies are needed to confirm its exact classification within the Euphorbiaceae family.
uses: Jupunba turbinata has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Traditionally, it has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions.
